products.name: SkyLink® Mini II
products.descriptor: High-gain DO-160-certified airborne tracking antenna, 1.2–18 GHz

evidence.snippet:
#### SkyLink® Mini II
High-Gain, Airborne Tracking Antenna

More than a decade ago SkyLink® Mini set the stage for a new era of lightweight, high-performance airborne tracking antennas. The only steerable airborne antenna to pass DO-160 testing Mini II improves performance, range and throughput.

###### ITAR FREE
![](https://trollsystems.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/Map@2x.png)
MADE IN THE USA

products.name: SkyLink® DP Omni
products.descriptor: Deployable dual-polarized omnidirectional MIMO airborne antenna system

evidence.snippet:
#### SkyLink® MIMO – DP
1×2, 2×2 or 4x4 Multi-Band MIMO Antenna
=======================================
This popular deployable data link system extends a mast below the aircraft skids to allow omni-directional antennas to eliminate interference or being blocked by external payloads: camera gimbals, floats, steps and other aircraft mounted equipment.

###### ITAR FREE
